prompt_text:
### Demographics: 66-year-old Asian man

### Visit type: Follow-up visit (12-month follow-up)

### Reason for visit / current symptoms
Reason for visit: Routine follow-up (every 3 months) | Diagnosis context: 18 years ago Diagnosed with type 2 diabetes after ophthalmology referral for suspected retinopathy
Current symptoms: Postprandial fatigue and thirst noted; no DKA/HHS signs; no recent hypoglycemia

### History
- Other conditions: Chronic kidney disease Stage 3b (30-44)
Body mass index category: Obese Class I
Diabetic retinopathy
Diabetic Retinopathy
Psychotic Disorder on Atypical Antipsychotics
Rheumatoid Arthritis
Orthopedic fracture (healed)
- Diabetes-related comorbidities: CKD: Stage 3b (30-44); HF (No); ASCVD (No); MASLD: Normal; BMI Category: Obese Class I
- Family history: Type 2 diabetes (maternal grandmother)
- Social history: Former smoker (quit 5 years ago; 10 cigarettes/day for 30 years; ~15 pack-years); Alcohol 5-6 drinks/week (1-2 per sitting)

### Medication information
- Current medications: Metformin 500mg twice daily; Empagliflozin 10mg once daily; Insulin Glargine 15units once daily; Olanzapine (10 mg nightly), Methotrexate (15 mg weekly), Prednisone (5 mg daily), Rosuvastatin (10 mg daily), Lisinopril (10 mg daily)

### Physical exam (current)
Weight 85.4 kg; Height 169.6 cm; BMI 29.7 kg/m²; Blood pressure 145/70 mmHg

### Laboratory values (with date / relative timing)
Format: YYYY-MM-DD value or relative timing (12 months ago / 9 months ago / 6 months ago / 3 months ago / current)
Order: 12 months ago -> 9 months ago -> 6 months ago -> 3 months ago -> current
- Glycemia: HbA1c (12 months ago 9.2%; 9 months ago 9.6%; 6 months ago 10.1%; 3 months ago 10.6%; current 10.4%), FPG (12 months ago 228mg/dL; 9 months ago 237mg/dL; 6 months ago 219mg/dL; 3 months ago 306mg/dL; current 297mg/dL)
- Anthropometrics / blood pressure: Weight (12 months ago 85.2kg; 9 months ago 86.7kg; 6 months ago 82.8kg; 3 months ago 84.2kg; current 85.4kg), Height (12 months ago 169.6cm; 9 months ago 169.6cm; 6 months ago 169.6cm; 3 months ago 169.6cm; current 169.6cm), BMI (12 months ago 30.0kg/m²; 9 months ago 30.0kg/m²; 6 months ago 29.0kg/m²; 3 months ago 29.0kg/m²; current 29.7kg/m²), SBP (12 months ago 141mmHg; 9 months ago 145mmHg; 6 months ago 143mmHg; 3 months ago 142mmHg; current 145mmHg), DBP (12 months ago 72mmHg; 9 months ago 71mmHg; 6 months ago 69mmHg; 3 months ago 70mmHg; current 70mmHg)
- Liver function: ALT (12 months ago 10U/L; 9 months ago 11U/L; 6 months ago 17U/L; 3 months ago 11U/L; current 14U/L), AST (12 months ago 18U/L; 9 months ago 19U/L; 6 months ago 10U/L; 3 months ago 18U/L; current 15U/L), Total Bilirubin (12 months ago 1.2mg/dL; 9 months ago 1.1mg/dL; 6 months ago 1.1mg/dL; 3 months ago 1.2mg/dL; current 1.1mg/dL)
- Kidney: eGFR (12 months ago 38mL/min/1.73m²; 9 months ago 40mL/min/1.73m²; 6 months ago 37mL/min/1.73m²; 3 months ago 37mL/min/1.73m²; current 37mL/min/1.73m²), UACR (12 months ago 107mg/g; 9 months ago 87mg/g; 6 months ago 129mg/g; 3 months ago 130mg/g; current 124mg/g)
- Lipids: LDL (12 months ago 87mg/dL; 9 months ago 82mg/dL; 6 months ago 85mg/dL; 3 months ago 79mg/dL; current 83mg/dL); HDL (12 months ago 48mg/dL; 9 months ago 48mg/dL; 6 months ago 48mg/dL; 3 months ago 49mg/dL; current 50mg/dL); Triglycerides (12 months ago 153mg/dL; 9 months ago 136mg/dL; 6 months ago 153mg/dL; 3 months ago 155mg/dL; current 146mg/dL)
- Hemoglobin: Hemoglobin (12 months ago 11.0g/dL; 9 months ago 11.0g/dL; 6 months ago 11.0g/dL; 3 months ago 11.0g/dL; current 10.9g/dL)
- Additional tests: urine ketone Negative (Current); fasting C-peptide Not measured (Current)

### Individualized treatment decision factors
Current adherence and self-management: Very poor adherence (estimated <50%); SMBG rarely performed; lifestyle control severely limited.
Financial context: Patient has standard insurance with moderate copays and a monthly medication budget of ≤ KRW 500,000.
